key.name: show-icon
key.description: Display the Claude logo in the panel.

key.name: panel-gauge
key.description: Which usage gauge to draw in the panel: a circular ring, a horizontal bar, or none.

key.name: show-percentage
key.description: Display the usage percentage number in the panel.

key.name: show-tier
key.description: Display the subscription tier label in the panel.

key.name: show-reset
key.description: Display, in the panel, the time left before the window selected by panel-window resets.

key.name: panel-window
key.description: Which usage window the panel ring and percentage reflect.

key.name: poll-seconds
key.description: How often, in seconds, to poll for updated usage.

key.name: access-token
key.description: Access token from the in-app sign-in, used only when Claude Code is not signed in.

key.name: refresh-token
key.description: Refresh token from the in-app sign-in, used to renew the access token.

key.name: expires-at
key.description: Millisecond timestamp when the in-app access token expires.
